rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes with visible feature names
generic_rules: Generate AGREE contracts using logical operators and valid type declarations
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in output dependency guarantees
Encode bounded output behavior with clamping logic and limit flags
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
